textbook: 人教版 PEP 英语五年级上册

unit_test.title: Unit 4 What can you do? 单元基础评测

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 'speak English' 的中文意思是'说英语'。
questions.explanation: speak 是‘说’，English 是‘英语’，故正确。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: 玩足球应该说 'play the football'。
questions.explanation: 在英语中，球类运动前不加定冠词the，应该是play football。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合oo的发音辨析
questions.question: 单词 'cook' 和 'cool' 中的 'oo' 发音相同。
questions.explanation: cook发短音/ʊ/，cool发长音/u:/。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: 句子 'I can sing, but I can't dance.' 表达了能力的转折。
questions.explanation: but连接两个分句，表示我会唱歌但是不会跳舞。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 'do kung fu' 的意思是‘练武术’。
questions.explanation: kung fu是武术，do kung fu是练武术。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: I can _____ English songs.
questions.explanation: 情态动词can后面必须跟动词原形。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: Chen Jie can play _____ pipa.
questions.explanation: 在西洋或民族乐器名称前通常要加定冠词the。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: -Can you swim? -______.
questions.explanation: Can you引导的一般疑问句，肯定回答用Yes, I can.

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: Please _____ the room, Robin.
questions.explanation: clean the room是清理房间，语义逻辑正确。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合oo的发音辨析
questions.question: Which word has a different sound for 'oo'?
questions.explanation: book发短音/ʊ/，其余三项发长音/u:/。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 你能帮我吗？用英语怎么说？
questions.explanation: Can you help me? 是询问对方能否帮助自己。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: He can play _____ basketball and play _____ erhu.
questions.explanation: 球类运动前不加the，乐器前加the。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: What's the meaning of 'draw cartoons'?
questions.explanation: draw是画，cartoons是漫画。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: I can't play ping-pong, _____ I can play football.
questions.explanation: 前后属于转折关系，使用but连接。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: We have an English party next Tuesday. We can ______.
questions.explanation: 在英语派对上，最合适的活动是唱英文歌。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: I can swim and I can _____ (跳舞).
questions.explanation: dance是跳舞的意思。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: What _____ you do for the party?
questions.explanation: 询问对方能做什么，使用情态动词can。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: Sarah can play _____ piano.
questions.explanation: 乐器名称前需要加定冠词the。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: I can _____ (烹饪) for my mother.
questions.explanation: cook是烹饪、做饭的意思。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 请将下列动词短语与中文意思匹配。
questions.explanation: cook-做饭, swim-游泳, do kung fu-练武术, draw cartoons-画漫画。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 请将乐器与动作匹配。
questions.explanation: play the pipa-弹琵琶, play the piano-弹钢琴, speak English-说英语, clean the desk-打扫课桌。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: 连词成句：can, I, swim, .
questions.explanation: 陈述句语序为主语+can+动词原形。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: 连词成句：What, can, do, you, ?
questions.explanation: 疑问句语序为疑问词+can+主语+动词原形。

exam.title: 五年级上册第四单元学业质量监测卷

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合oo的发音辨析
questions.question: 'food' 中的 'oo' 发音和 'cool' 是一样的。
questions.explanation: 两个单词中的oo都发长音/u:/。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: 弹钢琴是 'play piano'，打篮球是 'play basketball'。
questions.explanation: 乐器piano前面必须加the。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: Can you speak Chinese? 意思是你不能说汉语吗？
questions.explanation: 这是一个肯定形式的一般疑问句，意思是‘你会说汉语吗？’。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: He can plays the pipa.
questions.explanation: 不管主语是否为第三人称单数，can后面的动词都必须用原形。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 'send' 的意思是发出/送出。
questions.explanation: send email是发邮件，send意为发出。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: Oliver can't play football, _____ he can do some kung fu.
questions.explanation: 表示转折关系用but。

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合oo的发音辨析
questions.question: Which word has a different sound for 'oo' than 'foot'?
questions.explanation: foot, good, look, cook均发/ʊ/，而cool发/u:/。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: Robin can _____ English and Chinese.
questions.explanation: 表达‘说某种语言’固定搭配用speak。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: -What can you do?  -_____.
questions.explanation: 针对What can you do的回答，应使用I can...

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: Sarah can _____ for the party.
questions.explanation: can之后接动词原形。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: I like music. I can play _____ piano, but I can't play _____ ping-pong.
questions.explanation: 乐器前有the，球类前无the。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: We can help you _____.
questions.explanation: help you learn是‘帮你学习’，符合逻辑。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: Which of the following is a sport(运动)?
questions.explanation: 踢足球是一项体育运动。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: I can help my mother _____ the clothes.
questions.explanation: help sb (to) do sth，这里省略了to，用原形wash。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: -Can you do any kung fu? -_____.
questions.explanation: 否定回答用No, I can't.

questions.knowledge_point: 语音：字母组合oo的发音辨析
questions.question: The opposite(反义词) of 'bad' is g_____.
questions.explanation: bad的反义词是good。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: I often play _____ football with my friends.
questions.explanation: 根据题干，这里缺动词play。

questions.knowledge_point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
questions.question: I _____ (不能) speak English.
questions.explanation: 不能是can not的缩写can't。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: Can you draw _____ (漫画)?
questions.explanation: cartoon的复数形式cartoons。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 连线相应的活动：
questions.explanation: play ping-pong-打乒乓球, play the violin-拉小提琴, do kung fu-练武术, wash clothes-洗衣服。

questions.knowledge_point: 个人能力动词短语
questions.question: 匹配动作与场所：
questions.explanation: 游泳在泳池，篮球在操场，读书在图书馆，唱歌在音乐教室。

questions.knowledge_point: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
questions.question: 连词成句：play, I, can, the, pipa, .
questions.explanation: 注意乐器前的the位置。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 描述自己或他人在艺术、体育、生活等方面的能力。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 动词原形 + 名词 (如: sing English songs, do kung fu)
common_mistakes: 将'练武术'说成'play kung fu'（应使用do）
词组拼写错误，如'pipa'拼写成'piapa'
knowledge_summary.tips: 可以通过肢体动作演示来记忆这些动词短语。

knowledge_summary.point: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
knowledge_summary.core_concept: can表示'能'，后面接动词原形，否定形式为can't。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 主语 + can/can't + 动词原形 (+ 其他).
common_mistakes: 在can后面误用动词ing形式或三单形式
回答Can you...时误用Yes, I do.
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住can是一个'法力无边'的词，它可以让后面的动词全部变回原形。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 在英语中，弹奏乐器名和进行球类运动名称前的定冠词用法不同。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: play + the + 乐器; play + 球类运动 (无冠词)
knowledge_summary.tips: 口诀：乐器有'脸'(the)，球类没'脸'。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 字母组合oo在不同单词中可以发长音/u:/或短音/ʊ/。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 长音/u:/: food, cool, zoo; 短音/ʊ/: book, cook, foot, good.
